query: who is the creator of c++
answer:
**The creator of C++ is *Bjarne Stroustrup*, a Danish computer scientist who designed and implemented the language beginning in 1979 at Bell Labs.**   [Bjarne Stroustrup's Homepage](https://www.stroustrup.com/)  [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bjarne_Stroustrup)
